Daily Intimate Brightening Care Clean and fully dry intimate skin, apply an appropriate amount evenly to intimate areas, inner thighs and groin, massage gently in circular motions for 1–2 minutes until fully absorbed. Daily use fades pigment and restores a bright, even skin tone over time. 2. Emergency Full-Body Spot Brightening Apply a thicker layer to pigmented areas including underarms, knees and elbows, massage daily to rapidly correct localized discoloration and rough dark skin for uniform overall body tone. 3. Targeted Postnatal Pigment Repair Apply a thin layer morning and night to postnatal hormone-induced discoloration after cleansing. Continuous nourishment accelerates the metabolism of pregnancy-era melanin and repairs dull damaged skin to restore bright, even texture. 4. Portable Hydrating Brightening Care Compact size for easy carrying, reapply anytime after prolonged sitting or sweating to hydrate skin and reduce instant dullness for long-term protection of delicate intimate skin. Detailed Application Steps 1. Clean targeted intimate and discolored skin with warm water, pat dry gently with a clean towel to keep skin dry and sanitized; 2. Dispense proper amount of vitamin C cream and dot onto intimate areas, underarms and pigmented zones; 3. Massage lightly in circular motions for 1–2 minutes to boost deep penetration of vitamin C and niacinamide for melanin breakdown and nourishment; 4. Leave to fully absorb with no rinsing required, then dress normally for long-lasting melanin-blocking brightening and barrier repair. Precautions • Perform a patch test on a small skin area before first use; discontinue use if redness, itchiness or stinging occurs before full application. • Stop usage if skin has open wounds, inflamed swelling, severe allergies or dermatological conditions. • For external body use only. Rinse eyes thoroughly with plenty of running water if accidental contact occurs. • Adult supervision required for minors to prevent accidental ingestion or improper eye contact. • Store in a cool, dry place away from direct sunlight and high temperatures, out of children’s reach. • Vitamin C oxidizes easily under light; finish the product quickly after opening to guarantee brightening efficacy.

LYDIMOON 3 IN 1 Vitamin C Whitening Cream (50g)

Main Product Features

Unisex plant-based triple-action brightening formula, specially formulated for darkened underarms, intimate area dullness, pigmentation from friction on inner thighs, discolored elbow and knee joints, hormonal pigment buildup during pregnancy, and thickened dead skin from prolonged sitting. Formulated with a skin-friendly weak acid system, free of alcohol and harsh irritants, safe for delicate intimate skin and thin underarm skin to stabilize the natural skin barrier.

Infused with high-potency vitamin C extract, paired with niacinamide and arbutin to inhibit melanin production. Its small-molecule structure delivers deep penetration into melanin layers, blocking new melanin formation while accelerating the shedding of old melanin. It fades stubborn dark marks caused by friction-induced discoloration, hormonal dullness and oxidation from heat and sweat, preventing recurring pigmentation at the source.

Fortified with sodium hyaluronate and soothing botanical extracts to repair fragile skin damaged by friction, relieving dryness, flakiness and roughness in darkened areas while strengthening skin defense to reduce pigment triggered by external irritants. Targets six major skin concerns: underarm pigmentation, dark folds in intimate areas, friction discoloration on inner thighs, yellowed dead skin on joints, localized postnatal pigment buildup and lackluster rough skin. Optimized for hot, humid climates like Singapore, it alleviates dead skin accumulation and yellow discoloration from heat and sweat, while gently improving underarm odor and dullness. Suitable for full scenarios including intimate care, underarm brightening, joint skin rejuvenation and on-the-go travel care.

Crafted with a lightweight cream base without heavy occlusive oils, it never clogs underarm sweat glands or pores of intimate skin. Consistent use refines skin texture and evens discolored areas to fade dark undertones. Infused with a fresh subtle citrus vitamin C scent that gently neutralizes underarm odor with a light, non-overpowering fragrance. Ideal for office workers with sedentary lifestyles, postnatal skin repair, naturally hyperpigmented skin and post-hair removal pigment rebound.

Light Cream Texture | Fast Absorption, No Sticky Residue

Smooth citrus-scented cream glides on effortlessly and absorbs rapidly upon contact, leaving no greasy film. Underarms and intimate areas stay dry post-application without sticking to undergarments, delivering moisturization while maintaining breathable, supple skin long-term.

Triple-Area Multi-Purpose Use | Long-Term Melanin Inhibition for All Skin Types

Works for all pigment-prone body areas: underarms, intimate regions, groin, elbows, knees and darkened areolas, gentle enough for sensitive thin skin. Single application instantly hydrates and softens skin; prolonged use continuously breaks down melanin to fade long-term stubborn discoloration, slough off dead rough skin and brighten all easily-darkened body zones for all-in-one targeted brightening of underarms, intimate areas and joints.

Portable Squeeze Tube | Cost-Effective On-the-Go Care

50g portable squeeze tube design for controlled, hygienic dosage. Light-blocking tube preserves vitamin C activity to avoid oxidation and lost efficacy, with a sealed leak-proof nozzle perfect for makeup bags and purses. Ideal for daily home care, touch-ups during commutes and short trips – one compact tube covers targeted localized brightening for maximum value.

Brand: LYDIMOON | Net Weight: 50g / 1.76fl.oz

Target Users

Those with darkened underarms, pigmentation on intimate areas and inner thighs, uneven skin tone on elbows and knees

Application Methods

1. Daily Intimate Brightening Care

Clean and fully dry intimate skin, apply an appropriate amount evenly to intimate areas, inner thighs and groin, massage gently in circular motions for 1–2 minutes until fully absorbed. Daily use fades pigment and restores a bright, even skin tone over time.

2. Emergency Full-Body Spot Brightening

Apply a thicker layer to pigmented areas including underarms, knees and elbows, massage daily to rapidly correct localized discoloration and rough dark skin for uniform overall body tone.

3. Targeted Postnatal Pigment Repair

Apply a thin layer morning and night to postnatal hormone-induced discoloration after cleansing. Continuous nourishment accelerates the metabolism of pregnancy-era melanin and repairs dull damaged skin to restore bright, even texture.

4. Portable Hydrating Brightening Care

Compact size for easy carrying, reapply anytime after prolonged sitting or sweating to hydrate skin and reduce instant dullness for long-term protection of delicate intimate skin.

Detailed Application Steps

1. Clean targeted intimate and discolored skin with warm water, pat dry gently with a clean towel to keep skin dry and sanitized;

2. Dispense proper amount of vitamin C cream and dot onto intimate areas, underarms and pigmented zones;

3. Massage lightly in circular motions for 1–2 minutes to boost deep penetration of vitamin C and niacinamide for melanin breakdown and nourishment;

4. Leave to fully absorb with no rinsing required, then dress normally for long-lasting melanin-blocking brightening and barrier repair.

Precautions

• Perform a patch test on a small skin area before first use; discontinue use if redness, itchiness or stinging occurs before full application.

• Stop usage if skin has open wounds, inflamed swelling, severe allergies or dermatological conditions.

• For external body use only. Do not ingest. Rinse eyes thoroughly with plenty of running water if accidental contact occurs.

• Adult supervision required for minors to prevent accidental ingestion or improper eye contact.

• Store in a cool, dry place away from direct sunlight and high temperatures, out of children’s reach.

• Vitamin C oxidizes easily under light; finish the product quickly after opening to guarantee brightening efficacy.

product.desc:
LYDIMOON 3 IN 1 Vitamin C Whitening Cream (50g)

Main Product Features

Unisex plant-based triple-action brightening formula, specially formulated for darkened underarms, intimate area dullness, pigmentation from friction on inner thighs, discolored elbow and knee joints, hormonal pigment buildup during pregnancy, and thickened dead skin from prolonged sitting. Formulated with a skin-friendly weak acid system, free of alcohol and harsh irritants, safe for delicate intimate skin and thin underarm skin to stabilize the natural skin barrier.

Infused with high-potency vitamin C extract, paired with niacinamide and arbutin to inhibit melanin production. Its small-molecule structure delivers deep penetration into melanin layers, blocking new melanin formation while accelerating the shedding of old melanin. It fades stubborn dark marks caused by friction-induced discoloration, hormonal dullness and oxidation from heat and sweat, preventing recurring pigmentation at the source.

Fortified with sodium hyaluronate and soothing botanical extracts to repair fragile skin damaged by friction, relieving dryness, flakiness and roughness in darkened areas while strengthening skin defense to reduce pigment triggered by external irritants. Targets six major skin concerns: underarm pigmentation, dark folds in intimate areas, friction discoloration on inner thighs, yellowed dead skin on joints, localized postnatal pigment buildup and lackluster rough skin. Optimized for hot, humid climates like Singapore, it alleviates dead skin accumulation and yellow discoloration from heat and sweat, while gently improving underarm odor and dullness. Suitable for full scenarios including intimate care, underarm brightening, joint skin rejuvenation and on-the-go travel care.

Crafted with a lightweight cream base without heavy occlusive oils, it never clogs underarm sweat glands or pores of intimate skin. Consistent use refines skin texture and evens discolored areas to fade dark undertones. Infused with a fresh subtle citrus vitamin C scent that gently neutralizes underarm odor with a light, non-overpowering fragrance. Ideal for office workers with sedentary lifestyles, postnatal skin repair, naturally hyperpigmented skin and post-hair removal pigment rebound.

Light Cream Texture | Fast Absorption, No Sticky Residue

Smooth citrus-scented cream glides on effortlessly and absorbs rapidly upon contact, leaving no greasy film. Underarms and intimate areas stay dry post-application without sticking to undergarments, delivering moisturization while maintaining breathable, supple skin long-term.

Triple-Area Multi-Purpose Use | Long-Term Melanin Inhibition for All Skin Types

Works for all pigment-prone body areas: underarms, intimate regions, groin, elbows, knees and darkened areolas, gentle enough for sensitive thin skin. Single application instantly hydrates and softens skin; prolonged use continuously breaks down melanin to fade long-term stubborn discoloration, slough off dead rough skin and brighten all easily-darkened body zones for all-in-one targeted brightening of underarms, intimate areas and joints.

Portable Squeeze Tube | Cost-Effective On-the-Go Care

50g portable squeeze tube design for controlled, hygienic dosage. Light-blocking tube preserves vitamin C activity to avoid oxidation and lost efficacy, with a sealed leak-proof nozzle perfect for makeup bags and purses. Ideal for daily home care, touch-ups during commutes and short trips – one compact tube covers targeted localized brightening for maximum value.

Brand: LYDIMOON | Net Weight: 50g / 1.76fl.oz

Target Users

Those with darkened underarms, pigmentation on intimate areas and inner thighs, uneven skin tone on elbows and knees

Application Methods

1. Daily Intimate Brightening Care

Clean and fully dry intimate skin, apply an appropriate amount evenly to intimate areas, inner thighs and groin, massage gently in circular motions for 1–2 minutes until fully absorbed. Daily use fades pigment and restores a bright, even skin tone over time.

2. Emergency Full-Body Spot Brightening

Apply a thicker layer to pigmented areas including underarms, knees and elbows, massage daily to rapidly correct localized discoloration and rough dark skin for uniform overall body tone.

3. Targeted Postnatal Pigment Repair

Apply a thin layer morning and night to postnatal hormone-induced discoloration after cleansing. Continuous nourishment accelerates the metabolism of pregnancy-era melanin and repairs dull damaged skin to restore bright, even texture.

4. Portable Hydrating Brightening Care

Compact size for easy carrying, reapply anytime after prolonged sitting or sweating to hydrate skin and reduce instant dullness for long-term protection of delicate intimate skin.

Detailed Application Steps

1. Clean targeted intimate and discolored skin with warm water, pat dry gently with a clean towel to keep skin dry and sanitized;

2. Dispense proper amount of vitamin C cream and dot onto intimate areas, underarms and pigmented zones;

3. Massage lightly in circular motions for 1–2 minutes to boost deep penetration of vitamin C and niacinamide for melanin breakdown and nourishment;

4. Leave to fully absorb with no rinsing required, then dress normally for long-lasting melanin-blocking brightening and barrier repair.

Precautions

• Perform a patch test on a small skin area before first use; discontinue use if redness, itchiness or stinging occurs before full application.

• Stop usage if skin has open wounds, inflamed swelling, severe allergies or dermatological conditions.

• For external body use only. Do not ingest. Rinse eyes thoroughly with plenty of running water if accidental contact occurs.

• Adult supervision required for minors to prevent accidental ingestion or improper eye contact.

• Store in a cool, dry place away from direct sunlight and high temperatures, out of children’s reach.

• Vitamin C oxidizes easily under light; finish the product quickly after opening to guarantee brightening efficacy.
